query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.contactId) as totalContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enriched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'not_found' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as notFound,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentSource = 'apollo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as fromApollo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasEmail
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.id IN (120006, 120004, 1290005, 1740008, 1380025, 1380014, 1020016, 840002)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name;

SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.contactId) as totalContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enriched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'not_found' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as notFound,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentSource = 'apollo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as fromApollo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasEmail
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.id IN (120006, 120004, 1290005, 1740008, 1380025, 1380014, 1020016, 840002)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name;
